calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jan-02-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox for and with Debra Dolch.

The Court noted that Ms. Fox filed the trust instrument showing authority to sell and authority for Ms. Dolch to serve as Successor Trustee. The sale was confirmed at $1,067,500.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed November 18, 2019. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Trausch. Not reported.
